markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kick off the GrowthX engagement to align on Turnstile's strategy and goals.](https://fathom.video/share/irYiy1nzxRS3zD7pDr-KscUawCCqpd-y?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Turnstile is shifting from sales-led to Product-Led Growth (PLG) to serve early-stage startups, enabled by a new self-serve product launched last Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/irYiy1nzxRS3zD7pDr-KscUawCCqpd-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)
  - The primary ICP is founders of B2B SaaS companies \<$2M ARR, who face "undifferentiated heavy lifting" from manual revenue processes.
  - [The goal is to become the "day-one revenue platform" for startups, targeting 500 customers by EOY 2025 and aiming to be the top answer for founder questions on LLMs like ChatGPT.](https://fathom.video/share/irYiy1nzxRS3zD7pDr-KscUawCCqpd-y?tab=summary&timestamp=3251.0)
  - [A press launch is scheduled for Jan 21, 2025, making rapid content production a top priority.](https://fathom.video/share/irYiy1nzxRS3zD7pDr-KscUawCCqpd-y?tab=summary&timestamp=2373.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: Manual Revenue Processes

  - [Turnstile's origin is the founders' experience at their previous company, Second Measure, where manual revenue processes became a bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/irYiy1nzxRS3zD7pDr-KscUawCCqpd-y?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [**Core Issue:** No structured system of record for commercial terms (pricing, entitlements), which are buried in PDFs.](https://fathom.video/share/irYiy1nzxRS3zD7pDr-KscUawCCqpd-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [**Resulting Pain Points:**](https://fathom.video/share/irYiy1nzxRS3zD7pDr-KscUawCCqpd-y?tab=summary&timestamp=2549.0)
      - [**Time Drain:** Founders spend too much time on "undifferentiated heavy lifting" (e.g., manual quoting, billing, usage reconciliation).](https://fathom.video/share/irYiy1nzxRS3zD7pDr-KscUawCCqpd-y?tab=summary&timestamp=2645.0)
      - [**Data Inaccuracy:** Discrepancies between sales and billing numbers create confusion, especially during fundraising.](https://fathom.video/share/irYiy1nzxRS3zD7pDr-KscUawCCqpd-y?tab=summary&timestamp=2700.0)
      - [**Revenue Leakage:** Manual processes lead to forgotten invoices and lost revenue.](https://fathom.video/share/irYiy1nzxRS3zD7pDr-KscUawCCqpd-y?tab=summary&timestamp=2962.0)
      - [**Scalability Block:** Manual work prevents hiring AEs or standardizing processes.](https://fathom.video/share/irYiy1nzxRS3zD7pDr-KscUawCCqpd-y?tab=summary&timestamp=2810.0)

### The Solution: Turnstile's Quote-to-Cash Platform

  - [Turnstile automates the entire quote-to-cash workflow, from proposal to payment and accounting.](https://fathom.video/share/irYiy1nzxRS3zD7pDr-KscUawCCqpd-y?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [**Key Differentiator:** Stores commercial terms as structured data, enabling automation and analytics across the customer lifecycle.](https://fathom.video/share/irYiy1nzxRS3zD7pDr-KscUawCCqpd-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [**Pricing:** Starts at $100/mo + 0.6% of billings (vs. Stripe Billing's 0.7%), making it cheaper and more feature-rich.](https://fathom.video/share/irYiy1nzxRS3zD7pDr-KscUawCCqpd-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)
  - [**Strategic Goal:** Become the "day-one revenue platform" that startups never outgrow, building a business on the success of breakout winners.](https://fathom.video/share/irYiy1nzxRS3zD7pDr-KscUawCCqpd-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1968.0)

### The Shift: From Sales-Led to PLG

  - [Turnstile's product was built with core flexibility, enabling a shift from a sales-led model to a scalable, low-touch PLG motion.](https://fathom.video/share/irYiy1nzxRS3zD7pDr-KscUawCCqpd-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
  - [**Self-Serve Launch:** Enabled last Friday, allowing for rapid customer onboarding.](https://fathom.video/share/irYiy1nzxRS3zD7pDr-KscUawCCqpd-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)
  - [**Go-to-Market Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/irYiy1nzxRS3zD7pDr-KscUawCCqpd-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)
      - **Primary ICP:** Founders of B2B SaaS companies \<$2M ARR.
      - [**Secondary ICP:** Operations leads at companies $2M–$10M ARR.](https://fathom.video/share/irYiy1nzxRS3zD7pDr-KscUawCCqpd-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1679.0)
      - [**Disqualified:** B2C companies, static businesses, and pure PLG models without a sales component.](https://fathom.video/share/irYiy1nzxRS3zD7pDr-KscUawCCqpd-y?tab=summary&timestamp=2138.0)
  - [**Strategic Timing:** Catch founders early to establish good habits and avoid painful "data audits" later.](https://fathom.video/share/irYiy1nzxRS3zD7pDr-KscUawCCqpd-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1807.0)

### The Goal: Content-Led Growth

  - [The product is ready; the current gap is marketing and messaging to drive adoption.](https://fathom.video/share/irYiy1nzxRS3zD7pDr-KscUawCCqpd-y?tab=summary&timestamp=2072.0)
  - [**Overall Objective:** Exit 2025 with 500 customers.](https://fathom.video/share/irYiy1nzxRS3zD7pDr-KscUawCCqpd-y?tab=summary&timestamp=3251.0)
  - [**Content Objective:** Be the top-ranked answer for founder questions on LLMs (e.g., ChatGPT), which are considered more influential than Google for this tech-forward audience.](https://fathom.video/share/irYiy1nzxRS3zD7pDr-KscUawCCqpd-y?tab=summary&timestamp=3298.0)
  - [**Key Event:** A press launch is scheduled for Jan 21, 2025, creating urgency for content production.](https://fathom.video/share/irYiy1nzxRS3zD7pDr-KscUawCCqpd-y?tab=summary&timestamp=2373.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/irYiy1nzxRS3zD7pDr-KscUawCCqpd-y?tab=summary&timestamp=3510.0)
      - [Schedule a recurring 30-min weekly stand-up.](https://fathom.video/share/irYiy1nzxRS3zD7pDr-KscUawCCqpd-y?tab=summary&timestamp=3581.0)
      - [Request access to Turnstile's CMS and GSC.](https://fathom.video/share/irYiy1nzxRS3zD7pDr-KscUawCCqpd-y?tab=summary&timestamp=3520.0)
      - [Deliver V1 of internal AI-ready documents by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/irYiy1nzxRS3zD7pDr-KscUawCCqpd-y?tab=summary&timestamp=3515.0)
      - [Deliver a V1 content strategy by EONW.](https://fathom.video/share/irYiy1nzxRS3zD7pDr-KscUawCCqpd-y?tab=summary&timestamp=3551.0)
  - [**Turnstile:**](https://fathom.video/share/irYiy1nzxRS3zD7pDr-KscUawCCqpd-y?tab=summary&timestamp=3006.0)
      - [Share the detailed founder personas created by Seema.](https://fathom.video/share/irYiy1nzxRS3zD7pDr-KscUawCCqpd-y?tab=summary&timestamp=3006.0)
